title: DNA methylation in sperm of rats at two ages exposed or not to 2,2',4,4'-tetrabromodiphenyl ether
author: Arowolo, Olatunbosun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: Introduction
steps.instruction:
Introduction  
 This study was designed to determine the potential of environmentally relevant levels of 2,2',4,4'-tetrabromodiphenyl ether (BDE-

steps.title: to induce age-dependent changes in a rat’s sperm epigenome
and bowtie-2 (version 2
steps.instruction: and bowtie-2 (version 2.2.9). PCR duplicates were removed using nudup.py (version 2.2). The resulting SAM files for the control and BDE-47 group for the two ages, PND65 and 120 are uploaded.
